mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `user_chat_messages` WHERE sender_id = #{senderId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `user_chat_messages` WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `user_chat_messages` WHERE (sender_id = #{userId1} AND receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (sender_id = #{userId2} AND receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM `user_chat_messages` ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE `user_chat_messages` SET sender_id = #{senderId}, receiver_id = #{receiverId}, content = #{content}, message_type = #{messageType}, read = #{isRead}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
